channel.title: Junseo Oh Tech Blog
channel.description: Technical insights of Junseo Oh, Semiconductor Packaging & Test Engineer

item.title: FOWLP Stacking Architectures and Production Yield Optimization
item.description: Understanding Fan-Out Wafer-Level Packaging (FOWLP) redistribution layer (RDL) processing steps and molding deflection control.

item.title: HBM4 Specifications: Transitioning Base Dies to Foundry Logic Nodes
item.description: Why the foundational base die in High Bandwidth Memory (HBM) is shifting from DRAM processes to sub-5nm logic foundries.

item.title: 2.5D Packaging Substrates: Silicon vs Organic Interposers
item.description: Evaluating high-density Silicon interposers (CoWoS-S) against fine-pitch organic RDL interposers (CoWoS-R) on performance and cost.

item.title: Capillary Underfill Dynamics and Void Prevention in Flip-Chip Stacking
item.description: Analyzing fluid viscosities, dispensing patterns, and bump arrays to prevent micro-void formation during capillary underfill (CUF) processes.

item.title: Epoxy Mold Compound (EMC) Transfer Molding: Defect Prevention and Parameters
item.description: Controlling pressure, clamp forces, and viscosity limits to suppress wire sweep and void failures in mold processes.

item.title: Advanced Flip-Chip Interconnects: TCB vs Mass Reflow (MRB)
item.description: Comparing thermal compression bonding (TCB) accuracy against mass reflow bonding (MRB) output yields.

item.title: HBM Known Good Die (KGD) Test Methodologies and Yield Defenses
item.description: Implementing pre-stack probing, wafer thinning testing, and built-in self-test (BIST) sweeps to prevent stacked package losses.

item.title: Electromigration (EM) Reliability in Copper Pillar Bumps
item.description: How high current densities displace copper and tin atoms, leading to bump void failures under thermal load.

item.title: Panel Level Packaging (PLP): Warpage Control in 600mm Plates
item.description: Overcoming the mechanical warpage limits of large square panels to capture 3x yield gains over 300mm wafer processes.

item.title: Die Attach Film (DAF) Interface Void Control in Thin Multi-Die Stacking
item.description: Managing bonding pressure profiles to eliminate interface voids and prevent delamination in thin memory stacks.

item.title: Mitigating Switch-Node Ringing in Buck Converters
item.description: Designing RC Snubber networks to suppress high-frequency EMI ringing on switching regulator lines.

item.title: Managing Intra-pair Skew in High-Speed Differential Signals
item.description: Adjusting differential trace lengths on PCBs to prevent phase shifts and secure signal integrity margins.

item.title: LDO vs Buck Converters: Decoupling Noise from Sensitive Analog Rails
item.description: Comparing the noise spectrum, efficiency tradeoffs, and PSRR of linear LDOs against high-efficiency buck switchers.

item.title: OP-AMP Input Driver Design for High-Precision SAR ADCs
item.description: Calculating Charge-Kickback filter parameters and OP-AMP bandwidths to secure complete voltage settling before conversion.

item.title: Sizing Pull-up Resistors for Reliable I2C Bus Communication
item.description: Calculating pull-up resistor boundaries using bus capacitance and I2C rise time limits.

item.title: Leveraging Git Worktree to Handle Emergency Hotfixes Seamlessly
item.description: How to create parallel working directories inside a single git repository to bypass git stash context-switching bottlenecks.

item.title: Version-Controlled Architecture: Introducing Mermaid.js in Markdown
item.description: Ditching static image mockups to write live, auto-rendering vector charts directly in raw markdown code.

item.title: Building Sub-Second Summary Pipelines with Groq Llama-3 API
item.description: Connecting fast Groq LPU engine endpoints to parse text inputs and return abstract summaries under 500ms.

item.title: Split Ergonomic Keyboards: An Engineering Approach to RSI Prevention
item.description: How split board physical layouts and tenting angles prevent shoulder rolling and carpal tunnel syndrome.

item.title: Continuous Integration Pipelines for Static Sites via GitHub Actions
item.description: Automating compile scripts and static file deployments through cloud runner workflows.
